case_title: DAVID ELI ET AL VS. ISTVAN LASZLO VERECZKEY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELI, DAVID CHAN, JIMMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERECZKEY, ISTVAN LASZLO $5,401.53 PRINCIPAL, $108.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,510.03 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,401.53 FILED BY ELI, DAVID CHAN, JIMMY AS TO DEFENDANT VERECZKEY, ISTVAN LASZLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF DUE TO MEDICAL CONCERNS TO AUG-17-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF CONTACTED OUR OFFICE ON JUL-11-2022. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY ELI, DAVID CHAN, JIMMY VERECZKEY, ISTVAN LASZLO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $108.50) SERVED JUN-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VERECZKEY, ISTVAN LASZLO
DECLARATION RE: DEFENDANT'S CORRECT ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELI, DAVID CHAN, JIMMY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-17-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-17-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF DAVID ELI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JIMMY CHAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ISTVAN LASZLO VERECZKEY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VERECZKEY, ISTVAN LASZLO
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,401.53 **CORRECTION OF DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS** FILED BY ELI, DAVID CHAN, JIMMY AS TO DEFENDANT VERECZKEY, ISTVAN LASZLO
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
